properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7 v2 v8 v2 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's Your heart we're searching for We want You and nothing more Let Your glory fill this place We're alive in Your presence

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We surrender all to You Do what You want to Do what You want to

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God, we long to see You move Do what You want to Do what You want to Do what You want to

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are standing in Your light And our hearts are open wide Let us see more than before Lord, come have Your way here, yeah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God, we long to see You move Do what You want to Do what You want to, yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Have Your way here, in our hearts In our lives, in this place Have Your way

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And all consuming fire fall, fall on us All consuming fire fall, fall on us All consuming fire fall, fall on us, let's go All consuming fire fall, fall on us!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: God, we long to see You move Do what You want to Do what You want to
